$schema-notes: Your stores — this is YOUR data, edit it freely (same idea as staples.json). Fields: name; kind (grocery | warehouse | online | other — drives icon/sort); order_method (in_store | pickup | delivery — optional, how you usually get it); url (optional, the store's site for a future order deep-link). Stores seed the database only on first run; after that, manage them in the app. Items with no store show under 'Unassigned'.
